family_summary: Iraq invaded and occupied Kuwait on 1990-08-02. A U.S.-led coalition then fought a 43-day air campaign followed by a 100-hour ground campaign to expel Iraqi forces. For DR purposes, the conflict is best split into occupation, air, and ground episodes rather than forced into one whole-war ratio.
notes: Episode-first bundle. Core DR uses direct violent deaths only. Indirect mortality and mixed mortality are retained only as auxiliary context.
